mapper.select: select array_to_json(array_agg(json_build_object('propertyName', p.property_name, 'propertyValue', p.property_value))) as properties, t.content as text from (select property_name, property_value, text_id from core.text_property_added where text_id = #{textId}) p join core.text_added t on p.text_id = t.id group by t.content;
